home.hero_subtitle: We unite citizens, researchers, and entities to collect environmental data. Together, we better understand and protect our region.
home.feature_0_text: An open community of scientists, citizens and organizations working together to understand and protect the environment of Crete.
home.feature_1_text: To make science accessible to everyone, building trust and creating solutions for local resilience and public health.
home.feature_2_text: The active participation of the public in scientific research. It does not replace scientists, but creates a powerful collaborative framework.
home.principles_desc: Core principles governing every project on our platform
home.cta_desc: Start your journey in citizen science today.
home.partners_desc: Supported by leading research organizations and entities in Crete.

footer.desc: An initiative to enhance environmental research through active citizen participation.
footer.rights: © 2024 Citizen Science Crete. All rights reserved.

participate.title: Citizen Participation
participate.subtitle: Become a Citizen Scientist. Your contribution makes a difference in protecting the environment.
participate.step1_desc: Fill out the form to stay informed about activities in your area.
participate.step2_desc: Visit our platform from your mobile or computer – no installation required.
participate.step3_desc: Follow the project instructions and make your observations in the field.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.desc: Discover the actions of the Citizen Science Hub. See the results of past research and find active projects you can join today.
projects.no_results: No projects found for this category.

news.title: News & Events
news.desc: Stay informed about the latest developments, announcements, and upcoming events.

entities.feat_1_text: Research centers and universities can leverage our network to collect large-scale data with direct community participation.
entities.feat_2_text: Municipalities and regions can base their decisions on reliable local data (evidence-based policy).
entities.feat_3_text: We support the co-creation of environmental actions according to local needs.
entities.feat_4_text: We provide the expertise, digital tools, and methodology for the implementation of reliable projects.
entities.title: For Entities & Municipalities
entities.desc: Partner with us to strengthen environmental resilience, based on data collected by citizens themselves.
entities.form_desc: Do you represent a Municipality, School, or Organization? Fill out the form and we will contact you.
entities.f_desc_ph: Describe the interest or proposed collaboration...

opendata.title: Open Data
opendata.desc: Transparency is a core principle of Citizen Science. Here you can find the results of our research, maps, and reports accessible to all.
opendata.dashboard_ph: The map Dashboard will load here.
opendata.raw_desc: Download anonymous raw data for your own analysis, under an open source license (where applicable).

propose.title: Propose a New Project
propose.desc: Do you have an idea for a new Citizen Science project? Share it with us and we will help you design and implement it.
propose.success_desc: Thank you for your idea. Our scientific team will study it and contact you as soon as possible.
propose.f_name_ph: e.g. Municipality of Phaistos or John Doe
propose.f_area_ph: e.g. Heraklion, Chania, all of Crete
propose.f_desc_ph: Describe your idea, the problem it solves, and how citizens can participate.
propose.f_file_hint: Allowed files: PDF, DOCX, JPG (Max size: 5MB)
